verses.text: Laban' tapate in, “Jakob in i pa-a' khempeuh la khin a, i pa' neihsa tung panin amah in hih hauhna ngah hi,” a cihna thu tu-in Jakob in za hi
Laban in nidang bangin maipha tawh amah a donlohna Jakob in mu hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Jakob' kiangah, “Na pate leh na behte' gamah ciahkik in, nang kong ompih ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in mi sawlin ama tuuhon a omna gamlakah Rachel leh Leah samsakin
amaute kiangah, “Na pa un nidang bangin maipha tawh kei hong donlohna ka mu hi. Ahih hangin ka pa' Pasian in kei hong ompih hi
Ka tha neih khempeuh tawh na pa' na ka sepna na thei uh hi
Ahi zongin na pa un kei hong khemin, ka thaman sawmvei khelkhin a, ahih hangin kei hong gimsak ding Pasian in phallo hi

Amah in, ‘A gialte na thaman hi ding hi,’ ci leh tua ciangin tuuhon khempeuh in a gial ta hong nei hi. Amah in, ‘A dung gialte na thaman hi ding hi,’ ci leh tua ciangin tuuhon khempeuh in a dung gial ta hong nei hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in na pa' ganhing khempeuh la khia-in tuate keima tungah hong piazo hi
“Ganhonte ta nei dingin a kikholh hunin ka khuadak to a, a honte' tunga a diang keeltal khempeuh a dung gial, a bem gial, a puangin a omna ka mangin ka mu hi
Tua ciangin Pasian' vantung mi in ka mang sungah, ‘Jakob,’ hong ci a, ke'n, ‘Hiah om ing!’ ka ci hi
Amah in, ‘Khuadak to in la en in, a honte' tunga a diang keelte khempeuh dung gial, bem gialin puang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Laban in nang' tunga hong bawlna ka mu khin hi
Kei pen, nang in khuam khat sathau nuhin kei' tungah thuciamna nong bawlna mun Bethel Pasian ka hi hi. Tu-in kithawi in la, hih gam panin paikhia-in, na suahna gamah ciahkik in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Rachel leh Leah in amah dawngin, “I pa' inn sungah ei' tanh ding ahi a, ei' luah ding ahi zongin bang om ahi hiam
Amah in eite gamdangmi bangin hong ngaihsun hilo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eite hong zuak khin a, eite-a' ding hong kipia sum amah in zang mang khin hi
I pa' tung panin Pasian in a lakkhiatsa neihsa khempeuh eite leh i tate-a' ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, nang' tunga Pasian' hong cih peuhpeuh hih in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jakob kithawi-in a tapate leh a zite kalaohte tungah a tuangsak hi
Amah in a ganhing khempeuh, a ngahsa a bawng khempeuh, Paddanaram gam sunga a ngah ama neihsa ganhing khempeuh, a pa Isaac' omna Kanaan gamah a paipih dingin a hawlkhia hi
Laban a tuumul met dingin a paikhia hi a, Rachel in a pa' innsung pasian-te na gu hi
Jakob in Aram mi Laban khem a, tai ding a sawmna amah in genlo hi
Amah a neihsa khempeuh tawh tai-in, Eufratis gun kantan a, Gilead gam mualtung lam a manawh hi.
Jakob tai hi, ci-in a ni thum ni-in Laban' tungah a kigen ciangin
amah in a behte zawnin ni sagih sung amah delh a, Gilead gam mualtungah amah pha dekdek uh hi
Ahih hangin Aram mi Laban kiangah zanin mang sungah Pasian hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Jakob' tungah a pha hita leh a sia hita leh kam khat beek na paulohna dingin kidawm in,” na ci hi
Tua ciangin Laban in Jakob pha hi. Tu-in Jakob in mualtung khatah a puanbuk na lam a, Laban leh a behte in Gilead gam mualtungah phual a sat uh hi
Laban in Jakob kiangah, “Nang in kei hong khemin, galmat bangin ka tanute bang hangin paikhiatpih na hi hiam
Bang hangin tai simin kei hong khem a, hong genlo na hi hiam? Tuaci gamtat kei lecin, lungdamna leh lasakna, khuang leh laia tawh kong kha ding hi
Bang hangin ka tapate leh ka tanute mangpha khakna hong namsaklo na hi hiam? Tu-in na hai gamtat khin hi
Nang kong siatsak ding keima thu ahi hi. Ahih hangin na pa' Pasian in zan zanin kei kiangah thu hong gen a, ‘Jakob tungah a pha hita leh a sia hita leh na gen ding kidawm in,’ hong ci hi
Tu-in nang in na pa' inn nakpi takin lunggulh na hih manin na paikhia khinta hi. Ahih hangin bang hangin ka pasian-te gu na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Jakob in Laban dawngin, “Kei' kiang panin na tanute thahat thu-in nong suh khak ding ka launa hang ahi hi

Na pasian-te na muhna mi peuhpeuh kithat ta hen! I behte' muhna-ah nang-a' ahi na khat peuhpeuh kei' neihsa lakah a om leh kawkkhia-in la in,” a ci hi. Rachel in Laban' pasian-te a na guklam Jakob in thei khalo hi

Tua ahih ciangin Laban, Jakob' puanbuk, Leah' puanbuk, leh nasem numei nihte' puanbuk sungah pai a, ahih hangin amah in tuate mulo hi. Leah' puanbuk panin amah paikhia-in Rachel' puanbuk sungah a lut hi
Rachel in innsung pasian-te na gu a, kalaoh tutphah sungah koihin, tuate' tungah na tu hi. Laban in puanbuk sungteng khempeuh zawt a, ahih hangin tuate mulo hi

Amah in a pa kiangah, “Nang' mai-ah hong ding theilo ka hih manin ka topa heh kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh numei ngeina nin ka nei hi,” na ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in mundang khempeuh zong a, ahih hangin a innsung pasian-te mu zolo hi
Tua ciangin Jakob a heh suak a, Laban mawhsakin, “Ka mawhna bang ahi hiam? Nasia takin kei nong delhna dingin ka khialhna bang ahi hiam
Ka van khempeuh na thawi khit hangin na innsung nate mu na hi hiam? Eite gel kikalah amaute in thu a khen theihna dingin keima behte leh nangma behte' mai-ah, na muh a om leh hong koihkhia in
Hih kum sawmnih sung nang kiangah kong om khin hi. Na tuupi leh na keelpite tatolh nailo a, na tuuhonte' sung pan tuutal sa ka ne kei hi
Gamlak ganhingte' balzante, nang' kiangah kong puak kei hi. Tua banga supnate keimahmah in ka thuak hi. Sun-a kigu hita leh zan-a kigu hita leh kei nong lohsak hi
Kei pen tu-a bang ka hi hi. Sunin a sa in hong kang a, zanin a vot in hong tawp a, ka ihmu ngei kei hi
Hih kum sawmnih sung na inn sungah kong om khin hi. Na tanu nihte, kum sawmleli sung kong thalawh a, na tuuhonte, kum guk sung kong thalawh a, nangmah in ka thaman sawmvei na kheel hi

Ka pa' Pasian, Abraham' Pasian, leh Isaac' Zahtakpa in kei hong ompihlo hi leh, tu-in nangmah in khut hawmguakin kei nong sawlkhia taktak ding hi. Pasian in ka thuakna leh ka nasepna mu a, zan zanin nang hong thuhilh hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin Laban in dawngin Jakob kiangah, “Tanute pen keima tanu hi; naupangte zong keima naupang hi; tuuhonte, keima tuuhon hi a, na muh khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi. Ahih hangin tuni-in hih ka tanute hita leh amau' sung pana piang naupangte' tung hita leh ke'n bang cih thei ding ka hi hiam
Tu-in hong pai in, nang leh kei in thuciamna khat bawl ni; suangcian khat bawlin nang leh kei' kikalah teci hisak ni,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in suang khat la-in khuamin a phut hi
Jakob in a behte kiangah, “Suang khawm un,” ci a, amaute in suang la-in suangcian khat a bawl uh hi. Tua suangcian gei-ah amaute in an a ne khawm uh hi
Laban in, Jegarsahadutha, ci hi. Ahih hangin Jakob in, Galeed, ci hi
Laban in, “Hih suangcian pen tuni-in nang leh kei' kikalah teci ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in, Galeed, ci-in min phuak a
a khuam pen Mizpah, ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Laban in, “Eite khatlekhat i tuam om ciangin Topa in nang leh kei' kikalah hong encik ta hen
Ka tanute na bawl siat a, ka tanute' banah zi na lak beh leh, eite tawh kuamah a omloh hangin nang leh kei' kikalah, Pasian, teci ahihna phawk in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Laban in Jakob' kiangah, “Nang leh kei' kikalah ka phuhsa hih suangcian mu in

Siatna a bawl dingin keimah in hih suangcian khengin nang kiangah kong pailohna ding, nang zong hih suangcian leh khuam khengin kei kiangah nong pailohna dingin hih suangcian leh suangkhuam, teci ahi hi
Abraham' Pasian leh Nahor' Pasian, amau' pate' Pasian in eite' kikalah thu khen ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in ama pa Isaac' Zahtakpa tawh a kiciam hi
Jakob in mualtungah biakpiakna pia-in an ne dingin a behte a sam hi. Amaute in an ne uh a, zan tawntung mualtungah a om uh hi
Zingsang tungin Laban tho-in, a tute leh a tanute namin amaute thupha a piak khit ciangin paikhia-in a inn-ah a ciahkik hi.
